meta.description: Meridian Financial — complete attack path dataset from jsmith to Domain Admins. Use with BloodHound CE or path-analyzer.py.

paths.name: Primary path: Kerberoast → ACL abuse → DA

hops.action: Request TGS for MSSQLSvc/db01.meridian.local:1433 as jsmith; crack RC4 hash offline with hashcat and rockyou.txt (password: Sql2019)
hops.detection_difficulty: MEDIUM — requires logging 4769 and alerting on RC4 etype for service accounts

hops.action: Password spray remaining service accounts with the cracked password pattern (year-based suffix). svc-deploy reuses a similar password.
hops.detection_difficulty: LOW — password spray generates 4625 events; alertable if threshold is set

hops.attck_name: Domain Policy Modification — Group Policy Modification
hops.action: Use svc-deploy's GenericWrite on IT-Admins to add jsmith as a member via LDAP modify operation
events_generated: 4728 (member added to security-enabled global group) on dc01
hops.detection_difficulty: LOW — 4728 is detectable; alert on group membership changes for privileged groups

hops.action: Pass-the-hash to dc01 using jsmith's NT hash; IT-Admins has local admin rights on DC
hops.detection_difficulty: LOW — 7045 + 4624 Type 3 from unusual source is a strong signal

hops.credential_after: All domain NT hashes including krbtgt and Administrator
hops.action: Run secretsdump.py from SYSTEM context on dc01; extract all credential material including krbtgt hash for golden ticket persistence
hops.detection_difficulty: MEDIUM — 4662 detectable if audit policy is set; many environments don't audit this

paths.name: Alternate path: AS-REP roast + helpdesk pivot

hops.action: Request AS-REP for svc-legacy without any credential; crack the encrypted portion offline
events_generated: 4768 (AS-REQ) — looks like a normal logon attempt
hops.detection_difficulty: HIGH — 4768 events are normal; detecting roasting requires anomaly analysis

hops.action: svc-legacy can access legacy application; application stores helpdesk credentials in config file
hops.detection_difficulty: HIGH — application credential access not typically audited

hops.action: rrodriguez has delegated password reset rights on Finance OU; reset clee's password to attacker-controlled value
hops.detection_difficulty: LOW — 4724 is auditable; alert on helpdesk accounts resetting Finance passwords

hops.credential_after: Access to payroll application and financial data
hops.action: Authenticate as clee to payroll application; exfiltrate financial data
hops.detection_difficulty: HIGH — normal user authenticating to their application; behavioral baseline needed

paths.name: Short path: unconstrained delegation TGT theft

hops.action: Kerberoast svc-backup; crack hash; use credential to access backup server

hops.attck_name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets — Golden Ticket
hops.credential_before: Shell on backup01 (svc-backup has unconstrained delegation)
hops.action: Coerce DC machine account to authenticate to backup01 (printer spooler or petitpotam); capture DC01$ TGT from LSASS on backup01
hops.tool: Rubeus / mimikatz (monitor for TGTs); MS-RPRN / petitpotam (coerce auth)
hops.detection_difficulty: MEDIUM — unusual DC machine account authentication to non-DC host

hops.attck_name: DCSync using DC machine account TGT
hops.action: Use DC01$ TGT (a DC machine account) to DCSync the entire domain credential store

mitigations.control: Rotate svc-mssql, svc-backup, svc-web passwords to 25+ char random
mitigations.impact: Eliminates Kerberoasting as a stepping stone
mitigations.recommended_action: Migrate to gMSA (Group Managed Service Accounts) for automatic 120-char rotation

mitigations.control: Remove GenericWrite ACE on IT-Admins for svc-deploy
mitigations.impact: Breaks the primary path; secondary paths still exist
mitigations.recommended_action: Audit all ACEs on privileged groups; remove non-default write permissions

mitigations.control: Remove DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH from svc-legacy and svc-monitor
mitigations.recommended_action: Set userAccountControl to remove 4194304 flag; verify application compatibility

mitigations.control: Convert svc-backup to constrained delegation (or gMSA)
mitigations.impact: Eliminates unconstrained delegation TGT theft vector
mitigations.recommended_action: Configure constrained delegation to BackupSvc/backup01.meridian.local only

mitigations.control: Require SMB signing on all workstations and servers
mitigations.impact: Eliminates NTLM relay; does not prevent PTH directly
mitigations.recommended_action: GPO: Microsoft network server: Digitally sign communications (always) = Enabled
